channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in the road, not all of them are painted, 17th April
item.description:
Lots of potholes in the road, some have paint around but not all of the holes even though they are within a meter of each other

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root intrusion to pavement closing the footpath on dangerous junction, 17th April
item.description:
Outside front 11a and 11b Priory St. I first reported the issue under ref 11464935 3 years ago. The closure of this stretch of pavement has been since then. I have had replies from the tree unit on several occasions but no work has been started. We are extremely angry and frustrated as it is a blight on my property which we maintain to a high standard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11a, Priory Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Several potholes at the point where Broadclose Road meets the A38 which is a fast road. When one car wants to leave and another wishes to enter Broadclose Riad, there is a potential for accidents because the drivers are trying to avoid both hitting one of the potholes AND the edge of the drains. The road is not wide enough and there is the potential for accidents., 17th April
item.description:
At the junction of Broadclose Road where it meets the A38 Tewkesbury Road. This is where both pedestrians and cyclists cross the road, so traffic is heavy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadclose Road, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
